description.value:
Hoverzooms miniaturize hoverbike technology and attach to the bottom of any pair of shoes (or similar attire and appendages), providing extra momentum on sudden movements. You gain a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks. When activated, a pair of wheel-like magnetic resonance devices extend from the shoes and propel the wearer off the ground.

Activate—Zoom Zoom 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You push away from the ground and immediately Step. For 1 minute you gain a +5-foot status bonus to your Speed and your land Speed gains the hover trait.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Effect: Hoverzooms]

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-18: Midnights in Maro
